sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 1. Capital Adequacy Overview (‘CA’)
sections.description: Overview of capital adequacy templates and their purposes.

sections.heading: 1.1. General remarks
sections.description: General information about the CA templates.

sections.heading: 1.2. C 01.00 - OWN FUNDS (CA1)
sections.description: Template CA1 reporting the own funds of institutions.

sections.heading: 1.2.1. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Instructions for specific positions in the CA1 template.

sections.heading: 1.3. C 02.00 - OWN FUNDS REQUIREMENTS (CA2)
sections.description: Template CA2 reporting the own funds requirements.

sections.heading: 1.3.1. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Instructions for specific positions in the CA2 template.

sections.heading: 1.4. C 03.00 - CAPITAL RATIOS AND CAPITAL LEVELS (CA3)
sections.description: Template CA3 reporting capital ratios and levels.

sections.heading: 1.4.1. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Instructions for specific positions in the CA3 template.

sections.heading: 1.5.1. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Instructions for specific positions in the CA4 template.

sections.heading: 1.6. TRANSITIONAL PROVISIONS and GRANDFATHERED INSTRUMENTS: INSTRUMENTS NOT CONSTITUTING STATE AID (CA5)
sections.description: Template CA5 reporting transitional provisions and grandfathered instruments.

sections.heading: 1.6.1. General remarks
sections.description: General remarks about the CA5 template.

sections.heading: 1.6.3. C 05.02 - GRANDFATHERED INSTRUMENTS: INSTRUMENTS NOT CONSTITUTING STATE AID (CA5.2)

CA1.name: C 01.00 - OWN FUNDS
CA1.description: Reports the own funds of institutions, including Tier 1 and Tier 2 capital.

CA2.name: C 02.00 - OWN FUNDS REQUIREMENTS
CA2.description: Reports the own funds requirements of institutions.

CA3.name: C 03.00 - CAPITAL RATIOS AND CAPITAL LEVELS
CA3.description: Reports capital ratios and levels of institutions.
CA3.section_heading: 1.4. C 03.00 - CAPITAL RATIOS AND CAPITAL LEVELS (CA3)

CA4.name: C 04.00 - MEMORANDUM ITEMS
CA4.description: Reports memorandum items related to capital.

CA5.1.name: C 05.01 - TRANSITIONAL PROVISIONS
CA5.1.description: Reports transitional provisions affecting own funds components.

CA5.2.name: C 05.02 - GRANDFATHERED INSTRUMENTS: INSTRUMENTS NOT CONSTITUTING STATE AID
CA5.2.description: Reports grandfathered instruments not constituting state aid.
CA5.2.section_heading: 1.6.3. C 05.02 - GRANDFATHERED INSTRUMENTS: INSTRUMENTS NOT CONSTITUTING STATE AID (CA5.2)
